summary_one_line_zh: 今天主线：让模型更适配搜索/代理闭环，并且开始被更严监管。
summary_one_line_en: Models are being tuned for search loops, self-rewrite, and tighter regulation.

items.title_zh: 训练多样性以配合测试时搜索
items.why_zh: 把“训练目标”对齐到推理时搜索器，影响 AlphaEvolve 类系统的候选质量与泛化。
items.why_en: Aligns training with inference-time search, changing candidate quality for AlphaEvolve-like systems.
items.so_what_zh: 给你们的 search/rerank 体系加多样性指标，重跑一轮离线评测。
items.so_what_en: Add diversity metrics to search/rerank and rerun offline evals.

items.title_zh: 代理系统开始自我改写
items.title_en: Agents that rewrite their own source
items.why_zh: 把修复从“人类上线补丁”推进到“源码级自演化”，直接改写 agent 运维模型。
items.why_en: Moves fixes from human patches to source-level self-evolution, changing agent operations.
items.so_what_zh: 给代理加“可回滚自修复”分支，先在沙箱里跑失败案例闭环。
items.so_what_en: Prototype a rollback-safe self-fix branch in a sandboxed failure loop.

items.title_en: FTC cracks down on 'active listening' AI ads
items.why_zh: AI产品的合规边界从模型能力转向数据采集叙事，营销和隐私声明要同步重审。
items.why_en: Compliance is shifting from model capability to data-collection claims; marketing and privacy need review.
items.so_what_zh: 立刻审一遍产品文案和隐私页，删掉任何“监听/收集语音”模糊表述。
items.so_what_en: Audit product copy and privacy pages; remove ambiguous listening/collection claims.
